$comment: Workstream registry schema. One file per workstream in identity/workstreams/.
name: string, display name
tier: 1 = full workstream (slice + folder + AZ), 2 = tracked category (folder + AZ, no slice), 3 = idea (ideas/ folder only)
area_path: string, AZ DevOps area path name
folder: string or null, root-level folder name
slice: string or null, path to slice.md relative to repo root
trigger_words: array of strings or null, words that trigger this slice in CLAUDE.md boot
git_identity: object with name and email, or null (defaults to slice's own config)
handled_by: string or null, for tier 2: which slice handles this work
